name: Curried Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Rinse chicken, pat dry; dredge in flour.
3. Spray a large non-stick skillet with vegetable spray; heat over medium-high.
4. Add chicken and cook just until brown, turning as needed to brown all sides.
5. Put the chicken in a medium-sized shallow casserole dish.
6. In the skillet, over low heat, cook onion in 1 tablespoon water for 5 minutes.
7. Add apple and cook for an additional minute.
8. Spoon the onion mixture over the chicken; sprinkle with spices (curry powder, ginger, turmeric, salt, pepper).
9. Pour broth over all.
10. Cover and bake at 350°F for 55 minutes or until tender.
11. Add raisins and cook for an additional 5 minutes longer.
